self_report.reflection: Setting Area(A)=Area(B) collapses (the x_1 terms cancel) to c = x_2 - (3/4)x_2^3, combined with c = 2x_2 - 3x_2^3 on the curve giving (9/4)x_2^3 = x_2, so x_2 = 2/3 and c = 4/3 - 8/9 = 4/9. The Claim's value 2/9 is exactly half the correct answer.
self_report.notes: Direct integration with the standard area-equality cancellation yields c = 4/9, not 2/9.
